name: Heather Greene
description:
"Their sacrifice was meaningful, we will win, and Humanity will thrive."

Welcome to the beginning of what will be a long list of original female characters that you can interact with. Eventually, I will edit and make sure to display all the necessary information for you all to enjoy, but until then I hope you find my girls to be fun and lovely individuals. ( Or terrifying, depending on the routes you take or who you interact with.~ )

This is Heather Greene, all of her information can be found here in this document, I hope you enjoy it! And yes, you are welcome to copy the document to make your own detailed character sheet, I do not mind at all. I just ask that you don't copy my character outright for yourself, as Heather does belong to me.

Edit: Heather Greene is based in the Attack on Titan universe! Should have mentioned that before but it slipped my mind.

I use LLM for everything because I don't know or can afford anything else!! I do not control what the bots say!! Just hit next or adjust the text accordingly!!!

Otherwise, let me know how I can improve! <3 Thanks for playing!~
creator: RageQxeen
